canonical_definition: The latent ability of a model to monitor, evaluate, and regulate the reasoning processes of another model in a dialogue, detecting undesirable behaviours such as sycophancy and generating corrective, evidence-grounded explanations.
papers: DeepResonance: Enhancing Multimodal Music Understanding via Music-centric Multi-way Instruction Tuning
